features.name: procedural assignment to wire in always block
features.description: Code should include a procedural (non-blocking) assignment to a wire inside an always block, where the wire is used as an lvalue in the procedural context

features.name: wire holding memory read used in procedural assignment
features.description: Code should include a wire that holds a memory read result and is then assigned procedurally within an always block, creating a read-write conflict
